description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 27, 2024 at 10:16 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Larkin Street at Olive Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound on Larkin Street when a passenger car traveling directly in front of the Waymo AV stopped in 
lane, and began to reverse to parallel park at the curb. While the passenger car was reversing, the rear driver side of the passenger car made 
contact with the front passenger side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged 
in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position).  Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
